reward: Mean sole intrinsic J-lens target-word reward; GSM8K correctness is never a training reward and KL beta is 0.02.
jlens_label_mean: Weighted, clipped standardized J-lens target-word log-probability mass for the registered arm components.
validation/exact_match: Greedy numeric GSM8K exact-match on the fixed exposed 400-row training-split curve; observational only.
validation/literal_target_completion_rat: Fraction of decoded validation completions containing any registered target as a case-insensitive whole word.
selection: Development-only description of each fixed curve; no arm or later inference may be called statistically significant from this exposed screen.
